name: Mexican Chicken Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces.
2. Combine the soups, tomatoes, chicken stock, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
3. Place corn chips at the bottom of a 3-quart casserole dish.
4. Layer the chicken, tomato mixture, onions, and cheese in the order given.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes. (The dish may be frozen before baking.)
